verdict_reasoning: HSPA5 is canonically ER-luminal but translocates to the plasma membrane as a peripheral protein during ER stress, in cancer cells, and in response to stress conditions like UV irradiation and drug exposure. Surface-localized HSPA5 engages in documented functional signaling and is a therapeutic target. This stress-induced and cancer-cell-restricted surface display fits the cell_state_induced contextual category.
